zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Seymour I於1401年出生在英國維爾爾沃爾夫 霍爾時，他的父親Sir Roger Seymour31歲，母親Maud Esturnie27歲。他於1424年7月20日與Lady Isabel William在英國英格蘭布里斯托結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1435年被列為knight of the shire for wiltshire。他去世於1464年12月20日在英國英格蘭米德萊可堂爾 本 倫敦享年63歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾伊斯頓 堂。

nameMeanings.name: Seymour
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London): of Norman origin, a habitational name from Saint-Maur-des-Fossés (Seine), and possibly also from Saint-Maur-des-Bois (Manche) and Saint-Maur-sur-Loire (Touraine), named from the dedication of their churches to Saint Maur (see   Moore   3). The family of this name who have held the title Duke of Somerset since 1547 are said by some to have originated in Saint-Maur-des-Fossés (Seine), while others claim they are from Saint-Maur-sur-Loire (Touraine). They rose to prominence under the Tudors, when Edward Seymour (died 1552) held a high position of office under Henry VIII, who was married to Edward's sister, Jane. The Norman name has been established in Ireland since at least the 17th century.

variants.name: Moore
meanings: English: from Middle English more ‘moor, marsh, fen’ (Old English mōr), hence a topographic name for someone who lived in such a place, or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, as for example Moore in Cheshire or More in Shropshire.
English (of Norman origin): ethnic name from Old French more ‘Moor’, either someone from North Africa or, more often, a nickname for someone thought to resemble a Moor. Compare Morrell and Moreau .

English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name More (Old French More, Maur, Latin Maurus), originally denoting either ‘Moor’ or someone with a swarthy complexion (compare Morrell , Morrin , Morris , and sense 2 above). There was a 6th-century Christian saint of this name.

variants.name: Semar
meanings: Germanized form of French Saint Marc, the name of a Huguenot family that migrated to the Palatinate.
English: variant of   Seymour  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Seymour I was born in 1401, in Wolf Hall, Wiltshire, England, his father, Sir Roger Seymour, was 31 and his mother, Maud Esturnie, was 27. He married Lady Isabel William on 20 July 1424, in Bristol, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. In 1435, at the age of 34, his occupation is listed as knight of the shire for wiltshire. He died on 20 December 1464, in Tower of London, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63, and was buried in Easton Town, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Seymour I est né en 1401, à Wolf Hall, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Roger Seymour, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Maud Esturnie, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Lady Isabel William le 20 juillet 1424, à Bristol, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. En 1435, à l’âge de 34 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est knight of the shire for wiltshire. Il est décédé le 20 décembre 1464, à Tower of London, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Easton Town, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Seymour I 1401 in Wolf Hall, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Roger Seymour 31 und seine Mutter Maud Esturnie 27. Er hat am 20. Juli 1424 in Bristol, England, United Kingdom Lady Isabel William geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1435, als er 34 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als knight of the shire for wiltshire aufgeführt. Er starb am 20. Dezember 1464 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Tower of London, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Easton Town, Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Seymour I è nato il nel 1401 nel Wolf Hall, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Roger Seymour, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Maud Esturnie, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Lady Isabel William il 20 luglio 1424, nel Bristol, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1435, all'età di 34 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come knight of the shire for wiltshire. Morì il 20 dicembre 1464, nel Tower of London, Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Easton Town, Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Seymour Iが1401年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアウオルフ ハルで生まれた時，父Sir Roger Seymourは31歳，母Maud Esturnieは27歳であった。1424年7月20日にイギリスイギリスブリストルでLady Isabel Williamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1435年，34歳の時，職業はknight of the shire for wiltshireと記録されている。彼は1464年12月20日にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックストウエル オフ ロンドンで63歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアエアストン トウンにて埋葬された。

ko.Beheaded - Tower of London, London, Engl: 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 타워 프 런던

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Seymour I(이)가 1401년 영국 윌츠히르 울프 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Roger Seymour(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Esturnie(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1424년 7월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 브리스톨에서 Lady Isabel William(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1435년, 34세의 나이로 그의 직업은 knight of the shire for wiltshire이었다. 그는 1464년 12월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 타워 프 런던에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 이스트 타운에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Seymour I nasceu em 1401, em Wolf Hall, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Roger Seymour, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Maud Esturnie, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Isabel William em 20 de julho de 1424, em Bristol, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1435, com 34 anos, sua profissão aparece como knight of the shire for wiltshire. Ele faleceu em 20 de dezembro de 1464, em Tower of London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Easton Town, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Beheaded - Tower of London, London, Engl: тоуир оф лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.South Savernake with Brimslade and Cadle: соут савирнеик вит бримслад анд кадли, уилцхир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Seymour I родился в 1401 г. в местности волф холл, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Roger Seymour было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Maud Esturnie, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Isabel William 20 июля 1424 г. в местности бристол, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. В 1435 году, в возрасте 34 лет,  он работал по профессии knight of the shire for wiltshire. Он умер 20 декабря 1464 г. в местности тоуир оф лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности эастон тоун, уилцхир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Seymour I nació en 1401, en Wolf Hall, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Roger Seymour, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Maud Esturnie, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Lady Isabel William el 20 de julio de 1424, en Bristol, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. En 1435, a la edad de 34 años, su ocupación registrada era knight of the shire for wiltshire. Murió el 20 de diciembre de 1464, en Tower of London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Easton Town, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
